ideal_must_detect.matched_text: proposed acquisition of BlueQuill Dynamics Pte. Ltd

must_detect.matched_text: The proposed acquisition of BlueQuill Dynamics Pte. Ltd. constitutes MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Rules; information barriers remain active and the insider list is current.

From Ms. Liora Chan, General Counsel; DPO: Mr. Kelvin Miu, dpo@auroracomet.sg; Date: 28 May 2026.
The proposed acquisition of BlueQuill Dynamics Pte. Ltd. constitutes MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Rules; information barriers remain active and the insider list is current.
No research analysts have been wall-crossed beyond the four advisers named in the Insider Log, and the virtual data room excludes forward projections to avoid inadvertent MNPI dissemination.
Cross-border transfer: Data Export Approval DEA-26-045 was granted on 27 May 2026 for read-only payroll extracts to CloudNova EU-West for contractor onboarding; Schedule 2 (Processing Details) to the DPA with NimbusPay Pte. Ltd. sets the transfer limitations.
Completed control: standard contractual clauses-equivalent terms and MAS Outsourcing Notice addendum were executed and archived; there is no pending approval tied to DEA-26-045.
Employment onboarding forms were revised to implement data minimisation (no dependent NRIC or full birthdates collected; only month/year), and bank account proof is reviewed without retaining images.
DSAR: Mr. Ilya Sih submitted an access and correction request on 20 May; we provided machine-readable extracts and executed erasure in the marketing CRM and legacy HR files by 27 May.
Data portability has not commenced under the PDPA; nevertheless, at his request we ported non-sensitive employment history to a third-party recruiter via secure link, without transmitting MNPI.
